changelog:
* **feat: dynamic webview status bar theme** (26ebe23)
  Add dynamic light/dark status bar theme matching for WebView:
  - Add ThemeBridge JavascriptInterface to pass theme changes from WebView to Android
  - Inject JS MutationObserver to detect HTML/body dark class, data-theme attribute, and computed background colors
  - Add safe rgbToHex color conversion in JS to prevent native color parsing errors
  - Update status bar background and icon appearance dynamically on load and theme toggle
  - Keep status bar appearance locked during biometric lock screen overlay
